summary: Developed Telegram automation plugins for n8n, a Windows file-tagging utility, personal CV/profile card generation tooling, and refined development environment configuration. Also contributed to a yolo labeling tool and a custom Clash proxy fork.

items.title: Personal profile and CV automation project
items.description: Iterated on the profile repository's commit activity tracker and CV timeline generation rules.

items.title: Profile cards generator
items.description: Worked on the custom profile card generator, combining cards into a single SVG and adding light/dark theme support.

items.title: Clash proxy fork maintenance
items.description: Re-exposed API endpoints in the Mihomo-based Clash fork for FlClash compatibility.

items.title: TelePilot2 n8n node fork
items.description: Refined the Telegram-based n8n automation node, addressing continuous integration and publishing workflows.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Prepared a major release of the file-tagging tool, updating documentation and extending metadata capabilities.

items.title: Personal notes and development environment
items.description: Maintained personal notes and enhanced the Neovim-based development environment with modern configurations.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Initiated and polished a minimalistic YOLO labeling utility with batch operations and keyboard shortcuts.

items.title: TelePilot2 n8n node fork
items.description: Continued development of the Telegram automation node, focusing on stability and version updates.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Launched version 2.0 of the file-tagging utility on the Microsoft Store and extended its capabilities.

items.title: TelePilot2 n8n node fork inception and Docker support
items.description: Started the TelePilot2 fork with initial features, Docker deployment, and documentation updates.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Worked on the early version of the file-tagging tool, adding CLI support and UI polish.

items.title: Profile notes
items.description: Maintained the profile repository with occasional documentation updates.
